textPlain: Wait, can you actually just use IP? Can I just make up a packet and send it to a host across the Internet? I'd think that all the intermediate routers would want to have an opinion about my packet, caring, at the very least, that it's either TCP or UDP.
> Just a few decades ago, sending a few KB was quite the feat.Was it though? What year is it? This statement is both incredibly untrue and also true but only in a specific niche sense.
I hate to think of the future of these nice blog posts, that need to struggle to convince the readers about the organic level of their content.
